controller_bridge_state.busy_policy: If lease is active, do not start another Codex run; preserve the trigger and record a busy bridge result.
controller_bridge_state.escalation_policy: If the same trigger has 3 consecutive deferred_busy bridge results or remains undispatched for 12 hours, ike-pm may emit controller_bridge_escalation, but the bridge still must not bypass an active controller lease.
controller_bridge_state.completion_policy: Codex controller run must write a tasks/codex result artifact and update current_state.json if real progress occurs.
